title: Pentatrichia integra
taxonomy: Pentatrichia integra is a species of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is native to South Africa. The plant is classified as a member of the genus Pentatrichia. Further classification places Pentatrichia integra in the subtribe Arctotideinae. The plant's classification is part of the larger classification system of the plant kingdom.
